en.extract:
The friendly fantail (Rhipidura albolimbata) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae.
It is found in the highlands of New Guinea.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

[[File:Friendly Fantail 0A2A9762.jpg|thumb|Friendly Fantail]]

The '''friendly fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura albolimbata''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rhipiduridae]].
It is found in the highlands of [[New Guinea]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
